title: Vito's Timer
description: [DE] Eine Nachbildung des Timers von BastiGHG aus seinen Challenges. [EN] A replica of the timer from BastiGHG's challenges.
body: # ⏱️ Vito's Timer ![Screenshot of the Vitos Timer HUD inside Minecraft](https://i.imgur.com/fF80Woz.png) > 🎮 A modern Minecraft Fabric timer mod inspired by [BastiGHG](https://www.youtube.com/@BastiGHG). --- ## ✨ About the Mod ``` Vitos Timer is a modern and lightweight timer mod for Minecraft. Perfect for: 🏃 Speedruns 🔥 Challenges 🎥 YouTube videos 🎮 Custom gameplay ``` --- ## 🚀 Features ``` ✅ Modern HUD design 🎨 Custom colors 🌍 Multi-language support ⏸️ Pause support ▶️ Resume support ⚡ Easy commands 🧩 Fabric support 🪶 Lightweight & optimized ``` --- ## 📦 Commands ```txt ⏱️ /timer start → Starts the timer ⏸️ /timer stop → Pauses the timer ▶️ /timer resume → Resumes the timer 🔄 /timer reset → Resets the timer 🎨 /timer color → Changes the timer color ``` --- # 👤 Author [Discord Profile](https://discord.com/users/1470794991306805383) [Github Profile](https://github.com/VitooEU)
